data.acceptance:
1. Lease-backed `kno claim` and `kno poll --claim` completion commands no longer include `--actor-kind`, `--agent-name`, `--agent-model`, or `--agent-version`.
2. The work_sdlc prompt templates and public docs no longer instruct agents to restate identity flags when advancing a lease-backed step.
3. Automated tests cover lease-backed completion guidance and fail if explicit identity flags reappear.
